# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

parameters:
  - name: servicePrincipalName
    type: string
    description: Name of the Service Principal

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Azure.Management.Graph.Models.ServicePrincipal
    apiVersion: 2020-03-01
    name: $(servicePrincipalName)
    displayName: $(servicePrincipalName)
    password:
      value: $(servicePrincipalPassword)
      attribute: password

  - type: Microsoft.Azure.Management.Authorization.Models.RoleAssignment
    apiVersion: 2020-10-01
    name: $(servicePrincipalName)-subscription-contributor
    scope: subscription
    roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/Contributor'
    principalId: $(servicePrincipal.objectId)
